title: task
description: Zephyr SCHC (lichen/subsys/schc/) only has basic compression via bitstream.c and schc.c (~950 lines total). Missing fragmentation and reassembly that Python and Rust both have. Python has fragment.py + reassembly.py (~400 lines), Rust has fragment.rs (~800 lines). Implement or port fragmentation/reassembly to Zephyr.
close_reason: SCHC fragmentation was already implemented in lichen/subsys/schc/schc.c (commit 86b9df45d from 2026-06-29). The file contains complete fragmenter (schc_fragmenter_init/next/retransmit), reassembler (schc_reassembler_init/input/ack), and ACK handling APIs. Fuzz tests pass. Bead description was outdated.
